task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: Overview of the system installation (upto R4.3)

abstract.p: This document gives an overview of the installation procedure.

li.p: Use the information of the Site Preparation Guide to do a complete installation.
For Germany only: Check if a hard copy of the Operation guide is available for the customer in German.
If not, download and print the Operation guide. See: Operation and Safety information

note.p: Serial number, MAC address and software version (SWR) are on the sticker of the crate or on the top cover.
Based on the software version, you have to decide if you have to upgrade the firmware later on.

fig.title: Sticker with serial number on crate.
Sticker with serial number, MAC address and software version on crate.
Sticker with serial number, MAC address and software version on protection plastic of the top cover.

entry.p: Step
Action
Remarks
Preparations:

p.xref: Dimension and weight of the crate

entry.p: Unpack the printer.
See How to unpack the printer.
Place the printer and all other parts delivered with the system on the final location.

section.title: Finalize the printer
section.p: Video: How to install the Printer

entry.p: Step
Action
Remarks
Check if all parts for the installation are available:
See: Overview of the installation components and parts.
Remove the transport locking material from the printer.
see: Remove the transport locking material from the printer
Prepare the ink pumps for CMYK or CMYKW configuration.
See: 02 How to install and grease the pump tubes

note.p: When not installing White, do not grease the white ink pump and keep the pump tube out of the pump.
Keep the not used grease with the printer. Upgrade to white will require the grease.

entry.p: Install Aerosol Ink Filter Units.
See: 05 How install the Modification kit of the Aerosol Ink Filter Units (mod 01)
MOD01
Install the filters or external exhaust:
Do 24 How to install the Frame filters
or
Do 24 How to install the exhaust
Level the printer and adjust the winder.
See 00 How to level the printer.
See 19 How to adjust the winder with respect to the printer
Install the user panel.
See Install the operator panel
Install Optional units

li.p: JUMBO-roll
See: 12 How to install and configure the Interface unit for the Jumbo Roll Unit
Magnetic Media Kit

entry.p: See: 12 How to install the Magnetic Media Kit
Install/configure

li.p: Print inside Winding functionality.
Install the appropriate license.
Interface unit for JUMBO Roll unit.
See: 12 How to install and configure the Interface unit for the Jumbo Roll Unit

entry.p: Adjust the top cover door switches (24S1 and 24S5)
See: 24 How to adjust the top cover door switches (24S1 and 24S5)
Verify the strip support
Manually move the printhead carriage with a more or less continuous speed from left to right and back.
The top of the metal strip should remain at approximately ( within 10 mm) the same height.
Adjustment is necessary to prevent the strip support touching and damaging the top cover.
Execute the procedure05 How to adjust the strip support (to avoid bouncing)
Install the chiller
see: 06 How to install the chiller (V2)

note.p: Do not exceed the maximum of the full rang.
Fill first 6 bottles and when engine is going to standby, the last 2-3 bottles

entry.p: Install the printheads and dummy printheads (including the service jumper).
See 04 How to install the printheads.

li.p: In case of a CMYK installation, 1 printhead flex cable will be left over. This needs to be stored in the printer.
In case of a CMYKW installation, the dummy printhead of pos1 and its "plug air duct" needs to be stored with the printer in the service box.

note.p: Keep the blisters and caps with the printer.

entry.p: Check if the power switch is in the OFF position.
Place Tissue Wipe cassette.
Place the bag with

li.p: All caps of the ink tubes
All caps of the air tubes
the 2 protection caps of the glass fiber cable
Printhead Flat cable (in case Whit ink-option is not applied.
Dummy printhead (in case White ink option installed)
Plug Air Duct (in case White ink option installed)

entry.p: in the service box.
Place the service box below the media drawer.
Mount the cover of the knife compartment.
Configure the main voltage
How to adjust the voltage of the trafo box (V2)
see: 06 How to adjust the voltage of the trafo box (V2)

li.p: Open the lower cover.
Connect the 2 mains cables.

note.p: Use protective gloves if you guide the cables underneath the printer.

entry.p: Connect the network cable.
Place the 2 rollers on the winder.

section.title: Switch on / Software installation / Installation wizard / License request / Ink fill

p.b: If applicable: Upgrade the system to the latest available software version as described in the table below.

note.p: Depending on the firmware version of the User panel, a black screen might be shown for about 5 minutes.
Do NOT switch the machine off! This will damage the user panel since new firmware is being loaded.

entry.p: Step
Action
Remarks
Insert the installation USB key in the printer (USB port below the operator panel).
See 11 How to create an installation USB Key

note.p: Install with 'keep settings' set to yes during a system installation.

entry.p: Switch the printer ON with the power switch (next to the power inlets).
The installation of the latest software version will start now.
This will take approximately 60 minutes.

note.p: Keep the covers closed. Opening a cover will stop the firmware upgrade.

entry.p: After the Controller installation the printer will automatically start up.
Remove the installation USB key from the printer.
Follow the instructions in the installation wizard (Part 1) until the printer is rebooting.
see: Installation wizard (part 1) (upto R4.3)

Embedded Firmware (FW) upgrades of the PBAs are done in parallel. In case the FW upgrades are still running, the reboot takes longer since the controller waits for the running FW upgrades to finish. This is indicated in the operator panel.

note.p: Skip the license installation.
If a machine recoverable Error (MRE) occurs during the install wizard, you might need to restart twice to get the install wizard back!!
When the engine UI is displaying its content upside down:

li.p: restart the engine
disconnect the HDMI from the UI panel
wait until the power button is green
plug in the HDMI and continue

entry.p: Continue with the installation wizard (Part 2) on the operator panel.
When executing make sure you enable the remote service to be able to retrieve the license via ORS later.
See Installation wizard (Part 2) (upto R4.3)

note.p: In case the system starts and asks for ink you must restart the system and finish the wizard first. This must be done before you load the ink bottles.

entry.p: Access the printer 's web interface by means of a customer PC to retrieve the license information.
Request a license file for the system:

li.p: Request a license file for the system via ORS.
See: How to request a license via ORS
Alternative way of retrieving the license
See: How to request a license

note.p: Via ORS: Only execute the "Request the license" continue with the regular installation. Installation of the license can be after the calibrations.

section.p: At this moment the machine has continued with booting the Embedded Controller.
As a consequence the engine will request for ink to be filled and will request the waste bin to be replaced.
Filling the ink tubes and the printheads with ink is starting now.

entry.p: Step
Action
Remarks
Insert the SAM key and start SDS
See : How to enter SDS.
Step
Action
Remarks
Optional: only with external exhaust.
Set the filters or external exhaust configuration:
Do 24-1-001 Type of air filtering [Parameters].
Set the correct configuration (Default: Filters available).
Step
Action
Remarks
Optional: only when White functionality is required and white printhead is installed.
Set the white hardware installed:
Do 02-1-007 White Ink Hardware Installed.
Set the correct configuration (Default: No white available).
When white hardware installed is false the ui will not show White ink cartridges after reboot.
White ink circulation will not work.
White printhead will not kept healthy.
Restart the system via de UI to activate the configuration.
After the first or second reboot, in the right-upper corner of the ui the M3W or M5W should be visible.
Step
Action
Remarks
Check the ink levels on the UI. They must be 0%.
If one or more levels are higher than 0%, go to SDS and reset the ink levels / mark the jars empty. SDS 02-6-004.
Both 0.7 and 1L ink bottles will be accepted as long as the license file is not installed.
Later on the M3 license will only accept 0.7 L bottles.
Load the ink bottles.

note.p: Shake the ink cartridges ( YMCK bottles) well (10 seconds or more).
Shake the (W) bottle 30 seconds.

entry.p: Place immediately one set of 4 (5) ink cartridges (left to right hand side: Y, C, M and K). And W (optional)
Wait till the led's of the ink cartridges are switched on and the bottles are detected.
Release the handle of the cartridges.

note.p: Show the key operator how to load the ink bottles.
The system will give a ORE message (270001) to remind you that the ink valves of the printhead should be open!

entry.p: Step
Action
Remarks
Insert the SAM key and start SDS
See : How to enter SDS.
Step
Action
Remarks
Measure the media thickness of the installation media.
Enter the media thickness in µm in the corresponding parameter.
MediaThicknessServiceTestPaper: 25-1-006 Media thickness of Service tests - Paper media [um] [Parameters]
MediaThicknessServiceTestVinyl: 25-1-004 Media thickness of Service tests - Vinyl media [µm] [Parameters]
MediaThicknessServiceTestFilm: 25-1-005 Media thickness of Service tests - Film media [um] [Parameters]
For details see : Task [A] Set the media thickness for the calibration media [Tasks]
See 12 How to measure the media thickness
Load the media for the media calibration on roll 1:

li.p: minimum width 50 inch (1270 mm)
white and smooth surface
the media should not be too thin
the media should also be usable in loose winding
the media should fall in one of the media categories "film", "paper", "vinyl".
Example: MPI 2000 (preferred)

note.p: When you load the media, you have to enter the media width by hand.

section.title: SDS Task [B] Printhead and Engine calibrations

entry.p: Step
Action
Remarks
Set the output configuration to Wind the output = NO.
Wait until the printer is ready.
This may take a while (~15 minutes) since the initial ink filling procedure is now running.
For details see : Task [B] Printhead and Engine Calibrations [Tasks]
Execute the steps in the given order of SDS task [B]
Step
Action
Remarks
Print the Demo Print from the operator panel.
Do not cut the media after it has been printed. This is saves media for the next SDS test.

note.p: The Demo Print output is depending on the hardware configuration. (Gloss, Matt, Flex Finnish+and White).

entry.p: Step
Action
Remarks
Install the (base) license(s) you received via ORS.
See: Install a license via ORS
The alternative is to install the (base) license(s) you received via email.
see: Install a license received via e-mail
Verify if the expected licenses are also visible on the UI, otherwise printing from RIP is not possible.
Step
Action
Remarks
Remove the foil of the top cover.
Install the lower cover.
See Install the media output lower cover
Place the transport locking material, printhead blisters and media in area below the media drawer.
Mount all covers on the printer.
Place the grip lock on the cover beside the media drawer.
Step
Action
Remarks
Connect to the RIP.
Onyx:

li.p: Do How to install the Colorado printer driver in ONYX

p.xref: How to upgrade the ONYX printer driver

entry.p: Print from RIP.
Onyx:
Do Print the ONYX test print
Step
Action
Remarks
Ask the customer to create a shortcut to the Settings editor on a customers PC.
Access the Settings editor via any web browser, by typing in the printer's:

li.p: IP address
or
Hostname

entry.p: Use the link to create a shortcut on the desktop.
Install the Operation guide.
Step
Action
Remarks
Set-up Remote Service (If not done yet).
See How to set up On Remote Service (ORS)
Step
Action
Remarks
Set-up the TSM with a USB key or ORS.
See Install the HTML TSM from a USB key
See Install the embedded HTML TSM
Optional: Standard HTML TSM is already installed.
Step
Action
Remarks
Carry out the Quick Start instruction.
See Quick Start instruction.

note.p: For Germany only: Hand over the hard copy of the operation guide (with the safety information).

entry.p: Step
Action
Remarks
Create and Save the installation visit in ADAM.

li.p: Please indicate the time estimate you have spent on the installation.
Please indicate all the issues found as separate items in the collect phase.

entry.p: The installation visit in ADAM is replacing the paper feedback form.
Do not forget to check/enter the modifications in SDS.
(both from the yellow modification label and if applicable the firmware update)
e.g. Modification 1 for Install Ink Mist suction kit
Store the transport packing material, blisters, foam blocks and the media of calibration at the customers place.
